titel: The 'Saint Peter' of Sävsjön became pope in Crewe
html:
Ten members of a Shia sect have been charged in the UK with human trafficking, forced marriage and rape, among other things. The sect previously had a base in the village of Sävsjön near Hällefors.

The Bergslagsgården estate in Sävsjön was sold in 2022. "They were damn secretive people," one local resident tells Bulletin.
